objects.name: LLM Prompt Injection via Malicious Response Content
objects.description: Adversary influences LLM output to inject false data into the canonical threat graph.

objects.name: Supply Chain Compromise via PyPI Dependency Substitution
objects.description: Attacker publishes malicious PyPI package matching a project dependency; executes arbitrary code on pip install.

objects.name: Insider Threat: Malicious Code Injection via Contributor Access
objects.description: Malicious or compromised contributor injects backdoor code into agent logic or CI workflows that passes superficial review.

objects.name: LLM Response Schema Validation
objects.description: Enforce JSON schema validation on all LLM outputs; reject schema violations before propagating to downstream agents.

objects.name: Dependency Hash Pinning
objects.description: Pin all dependencies with SHA-256 hashes using pip-compile --generate-hashes.

objects.name: Branch Protection and Required PR Reviews
objects.description: Enforce protected main branch with required reviewer approval and GPG-signed commits.
